misc.text: Quienes consideran que ondear la bandera de un Estado es “incitar al odio”, o han perdido el juicio o han sido cegados por su propia ignominia. Lamine solo ha expresado la solidaridad por Palestina que sentimos millones de españoles. Otro motivo más para estar orgullosos de él.

misc.text: #ONEPIECE1182 Crazy that Loki still didn´t used his hybrid form which ragdolled HK Harald. I feel it will be a big deal once Oda show the hybrid form of Loki. Question will be when Oda reveal it? Before Luffy join the battle or after?

misc.text: I think we don’t Credit Ikemoto🐐enough for his designs. I don’t think there are Mangaka who put such thoughts into their designs like Ikemoto🐐 does. Designing fused Momoshiki black and white as a bridge between white and black people is a huge symbol against racism!❤️ #BORUTO
